title: Security Patch Evaluation Completion Tracking

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=patch sourcetype=wsus:summary earliest=-35d classification="Critical"
| lookup bes_cyber_asset_inventory.csv ComputerName AS host OUTPUT bes_system
| where isnotnull(bes_system)
| join type=left kb_id [
    search index=grc sourcetype=cip:patch_evaluation kb_id=* earliest=-35d
    | stats latest(evaluated_at) as evaluated_at by kb_id
  ]
| where isnull(evaluated_at)
| stats dc(host) as hosts_missing_eval by kb_id, title
value: We track that each published critical patch for BES assets received a documented evaluation record within policy time.
implementation: (1) Ingest patch catalog with release dates. (2) Require evaluation HEC event per KB. (3) Alert before internal evaluation SLA. (4) Export for CIP-007 evidence binders.
visualization: Table (unevaluated KBs), Single value (count), Time chart (evaluations)
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
